title: iberis lagascana var. granatensis
intro: Iberis lagascana var. granatensis, commonly known as Granada Rockcress, is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of glucosinolates. The health benefits of Granada Rockcress include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Iberis lagascana var. granatensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
